contributions.title: GIDP Inducers
contributions.subtitle: Double plays turned on opposing batters.

contributions.title: Contact Allowed Rate
contributions.subtitle: Share of pitches the staff allows in play.

contributions.title: First Pitch Ball Rate (Pitching)
contributions.subtitle: Share of first pitches that are balls (1-0 counts gifted).

contributions.title: First Pitch In-Play Allowed
contributions.subtitle: How often opponents put the first pitch in play.

contributions.title: First Pitch Strike Rate (Pitching)
contributions.subtitle: Share of first pitches that are strikes thrown by the staff.

contributions.title: Pitches Thrown Per Half
contributions.subtitle: Average pitches the staff throws per defensive half inning.
